title: Claims Analyst
description: Costco is seeking a Claims Analyst to manage insurance claims and member benefits from our Philadelphia location. You'll review claims for accuracy, process reimbursements, and resolve discrepancies. This hybrid role offers the opportunity to work with Costco's benefits team while providing excellent member service.
responsibilities: Review and process insurance claims; verify accuracy of claims data and member information
Identify and investigate claim discrepancies; communicate with providers and members to resolve issues
Manage claims database; track claims status and maintain detailed records
Respond to member inquiries about benefits, coverage, and claim status
Prepare reports on claims trends, denials, and performance metrics for management review

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field
